content:
Table: trips
Description: Records every trip taken on the platform.
Columns:
  - trip_id (UUID): unique identifier for each trip
  - user_id (UUID): foreign key to users table
  - driver_id (UUID): foreign key to drivers table
  - pickup_city (VARCHAR): city where trip started
  - dropoff_city (VARCHAR): city where trip ended
  - status (VARCHAR): completed, cancelled, ongoing
  - fare_amount (DECIMAL): total fare charged to the user
  - distance_km (DECIMAL): trip distance in kilometers
  - started_at (TIMESTAMPTZ): when the trip started
  - ended_at (TIMESTAMPTZ): when the trip ended

Table: drivers
Description: Stores all registered drivers on the platform.
Columns:
  - driver_id (UUID): unique identifier for each driver
  - full_name (VARCHAR): driver full name
  - email (VARCHAR): driver email address
  - phone_number (VARCHAR): driver contact number
  - city (VARCHAR): city where driver operates
  - vehicle_type (VARCHAR): bike, auto, cab, suv
  - status (VARCHAR): active, inactive, suspended
  - rating (DECIMAL): average driver rating out of 5
  - total_trips (INTEGER): total number of trips completed
  - joined_at (TIMESTAMPTZ): when the driver registered

Table: payments
Description: Records all payment transactions for trips.
Columns:
  - payment_id (UUID): unique identifier for each payment
  - trip_id (UUID): foreign key to trips table
  - user_id (UUID): foreign key to users table
  - amount (DECIMAL): total amount paid
  - payment_method (VARCHAR): cash, card, wallet, upi
  - status (VARCHAR): success, failed, refunded, pending
  - paid_at (TIMESTAMPTZ): timestamp when payment was processed
  - refunded_at (TIMESTAMPTZ): timestamp when refund was issued, null if not refunded

Table: promotions
Description: Tracks discount codes and promotional offers.
Columns:
  - promo_id (UUID): unique identifier for each promotion
  - code (VARCHAR): promo code string
  - discount_type (VARCHAR): flat or percentage
  - discount_value (DECIMAL): amount or percentage off
  - min_fare (DECIMAL): minimum fare required to apply the promo
  - max_uses (INTEGER): maximum total redemptions allowed
  - used_count (INTEGER): how many times it has been used
  - valid_from (TIMESTAMPTZ): promo start date
  - valid_until (TIMESTAMPTZ): promo expiry date
  - city (VARCHAR): city where the promo is valid, null means all cities

Table: users
Description: Stores all registered users of the platform.
Columns:
  - user_id (UUID): unique identifier for each user
  - email (VARCHAR): user email address
  - full_name (VARCHAR): user full name
  - phone_number (VARCHAR): user contact number
  - city (VARCHAR): city where user is registered
  - status (VARCHAR): active, inactive, banned
  - created_at (TIMESTAMPTZ): when the user account was created
  - last_login_at (TIMESTAMPTZ): last time the user logged in

Table: support_tickets
Description: Tracks customer support requests raised by users or drivers.
Columns:
  - ticket_id (UUID): unique identifier for each ticket
  - raised_by_id (UUID): id of the user or driver who raised the ticket
  - raised_by_type (VARCHAR): user or driver
  - trip_id (UUID): associated trip id, null if not trip-related
  - category (VARCHAR): payment, safety, app_issue, driver_behaviour, other
  - description (TEXT): detailed description of the issue
  - status (VARCHAR): open, in_progress, resolved, closed
  - priority (VARCHAR): low, medium, high, critical
  - created_at (TIMESTAMPTZ): when the ticket was raised
  - resolved_at (TIMESTAMPTZ): when the ticket was resolved, null if still open

Table: ratings
Description: Stores ratings and reviews given after each trip.
Columns:
  - rating_id (UUID): unique identifier for each rating
  - trip_id (UUID): foreign key to trips table
  - rated_by (VARCHAR): user or driver — who gave the rating
  - rated_entity_id (UUID): id of the user or driver being rated
  - score (INTEGER): rating score from 1 to 5
  - feedback (TEXT): optional written feedback
  - created_at (TIMESTAMPTZ): when the rating was submitted
